title: uiinpui's Advancements
description: A datapack I made to add more advancements to the game. It gives you a couple more challenges to do.
body:
This is a datapack that adds around 10 new advancements to the game. All of which can be found in the advancements menu when you complete their root advancement (or with commands I suppose). I am planning on adding more over time.


<details>
<summary>Examples of Advancements</summary>
  
- Sneak Attack: Kill a Warden with a single hit using the Mace
  
- End Trader: Bring a Villager to the End and trade with it

- The Tallest of Flowers: Plant every tall flower (Lilac, Sunflower, Peony, Rose Bush and Pitcher Plant)
</details>
